description: Built-in legacy aggregate targets: aggregate published statistics only (no individual-level data). Each target carries a tolerance used by aggregate-fit diagnostics (implausibility I = |obs - value| / tolerance).

degree_tail_exponent.source: Scale-free social networks: power-law exponent typically 2-3 (Barabasi & Albert 1999 and successors)

clustering.source: Online social networks: average clustering commonly 0.1-0.3 (e.g., Mislove et al. 2007 measurements)

diurnal_peak_hour.source: Circadian posting studies: activity peaks ~16-18h local time

diurnal_trough_hour.source: Circadian posting studies: troughs ~04-06h local time

posts_per_agent_day.source: Median platform posting rates: most users post < 1x/day; heavy tail above

appeal_grant_rate.source: Platform transparency reports: appeal reinstatement rates ~10-40%
